description: Fix review issues: (1) VictoryScreen not reachable after Lich defeat in story mode, (2) Lich's Offer event grants stats without per-turn damage cost. Issues #3 (toxic atmosphere damages enemies - intentional) and #4 (colon-delimited serialization - acceptable) are not changed.
steps: In CombatEngine.handleStoryModeEncounterComplete, check if completed area is LICHS_THRONE and transition to VICTORY instead of WORLD_MAP
In AreaEventScreen, add engine.getRunModifiers().setPermanentDamagePerTurn(10) when player accepts Lich's Offer (index == 0)
acceptance_criteria: Defeating the Lich boss in story mode transitions to VICTORY state, not WORLD_MAP
Accepting Lich's Offer sets permanentDamagePerTurn(10) matching classic mode's Danjin Heart cost
verification: Run ./gradlew classes and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL
findings: Both fixes applied cleanly. Issue #1: Added Area.LICHS_THRONE check in handleStoryModeEncounterComplete to route to GameState.VICTORY. Issue #2: Added setPermanentDamagePerTurn(10) call in AreaEventScreen alongside setDanjinHeartAbsorbed(true). Issues #3 and #4 left unchanged per instructions (toxic atmosphere damaging enemies is intentional; colon-delimited serialization is acceptable technical debt).
